notes: Well-structured documentation site. Clean semantic HTML with React hydration. Sidebar navigation is hierarchical. Search uses command palette (Cmd+K). Code examples have copy buttons and language switchers. Medium complexity due to SPA-like navigation and dynamic content loading.

endpoints.label: Documentation Search
endpoints.description: Search input / command palette (Cmd+K) for searching docs, API reference, and guides

endpoints.label: Docs Navigation
endpoints.description: Sidebar, breadcrumbs, and top nav combined: hierarchical sections (Get Started, Payments, Billing, Connect), position trail, and Products/Solutions/Developers links
endpoints.selector_hint: nav[aria-label='Sidebar'] a, nav[aria-label='Breadcrumb'] a, header nav a

endpoints.label: Sign In / Dashboard
endpoints.description: Header link to Stripe Dashboard sign-in

endpoints.label: Header Navigation
endpoints.description: Top nav bar: Products, Solutions, Developers, Resources links with dropdown menus
